zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival於1292年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾時，他的父親Thomas de Furnival27歲，母親Joan Despenser29歲。他於1318年2月24日與Joan de Verdun結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1339年10月5日在英國越可爾雪菲爾享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾雪菲爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival于1292年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾时，他的父亲Thomas de Furnival27岁，母亲Joan Despenser29岁。他于1318年2月24日与Joan de Verdun结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1339年10月5日在英国越可爾雪菲爾享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾雪菲爾。

nameMeanings.name: Furnival
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: locative name from Fourneville (Calvados), Fournival in Saint-Just-en-Chaussée (Oise), or Fournival in Saint-Julien-sur-Sarthe (Orne).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival was born in 1292, in Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Thomas de Furnival, was 27 and his mother, Joan Despenser, was 29. He married Joan de Verdun on 24 February 1318. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 5 October 1339, in Sheffield, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Sheffield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival est né en 1292, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Furnival, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan Despenser, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Verdun le 24 février 1318. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 5 octobre 1339, à Sheffield, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Sheffield, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival 1292 in Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Furnival 27 und seine Mutter Joan Despenser 29. Er hat am 24. Februar 1318 Joan de Verdun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Oktober 1339 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Sheffield, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Sheffield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival è nato il nel 1292 nel Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Furnival, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Joan Despenser, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Verdun il 24 febbraio 1318. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 5 ottobre 1339, nel Sheffield, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Sheffield, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnivalが1292年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas de Furnivalは27歳，母Joan Despenserは29歳であった。1318年2月24日にJoan de Verdunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1339年10月5日にイギリスヨークシュアイアシェフィールドで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアシェフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival(이)가 1292년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Furnival(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Despenser(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1318년 2월 24일 Joan de Verdun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1339년 10월 5일 영국 요르크실르 셰필드에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 셰필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival nasceu em 1292, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Furnival, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joan Despenser, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Verdun em 24 de fevereiro de 1318. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de outubro de 1339, em Sheffield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Sheffield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival родился в 1292 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Furnival было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Despenser, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Verdun 24 февраля 1318 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 5 октября 1339 г. в местности шеффиелд, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности шеффиелд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival nació en 1292, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Furnival, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Joan Despenser, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Joan de Verdun el 24 de febrero de 1318. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 5 de octubre de 1339, en Sheffield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Sheffield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
